commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Curseth, or speaking injuriously. The Athenians put such in prison.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: One who speaks ill of his mother or father will die the death. One who speaks well of them will have full enjoyment of the rewards of life. If our parents in the flesh should enjoy such good will from us, so much the more would this hold true for our parents in the spirit.
